TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Tony_Anthony_(actor), title = Tony_Anthony_(actor), year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tony_Anthony_(actor)} }

S.FORM: Tony Anthony kawas tay 1937, ryax sa tay 16 nqu tay 10, Tony Anthony, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
Tony Anthony kawas tay 1937, ryax sa tay 16 nqu tay 10, Tony Anthony, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: tonj antħonj kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, tonj antħonj, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
